fixup_summary: Renamed pheno-ssot-template/template.json → template.yaml to match the V3 L3 #55 spec verbatim (the README's 'Files in this template' table already said template.yaml, so the rename makes the on-disk file match the README's reference). Re-emitted the manifest in YAML (subset of the cookiecutter template.json schema with Phenotype-specific extensions under the pheno top-level key). Updated render.sh to reference template.yaml in 4 places (header comment, project_slug-regex comment, file-existence check, tar exclude). Updated the V3 exec log entry's file-map row to say template.yaml.
check_script_fixes: check-ssot-invariant-1-errors.sh: added a 'skip doc-comment lines' filter (| grep -vE ':\s*[0-9]+:\s*(\/\/!?|\*)') to both the pattern-grep `check()` function and the per-repo-enum grep, so a documentation example that quotes a forbidden pattern (e.g. 'no `Box<dyn Error>` anywhere' in the lib.rs.template docstring) doesn't trip the lint. Verified: positive test (clean render) reports 'SSOT invariant #1 holds'; negative test (injected `Box<dyn std::error::Error>` + `pub enum MyRepoError`) reports 'SSOT invariant #1 violated: 2 pattern(s) found'.

check-ssot-invariant-1-errors.sh: also rephrased the lib.rs.template module docstring from 'there is no `Box<dyn Error>` anywhere' to 'the only error type in this crate is `AppError` (no per-crate `Error` enum, no trait-object error wrappers)' so the docstring no longer contains the literal forbidden pattern. The semantic content is unchanged.

check-ssot-invariant-2-logging.sh: changed the format-placeholder regex from `\{[^}]+\}` to `\{[^}]*\}` (quantifier `+` → `*`) so the empty-`{}` form is also caught. Previously the script would silently allow `tracing::info!("loaded {}", id)`. Verified: positive test (clean render) reports 'SSOT invariant #2 holds'; negative test (injected `tracing::info!("loaded {}", id)`) reports 'SSOT invariant #2 violated: 1 pattern(s) found'.

commands: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('pheno-ssot-template/template.yaml')); assert d['name']=='pheno-ssot-template'; v=[x['name'] for x in d['variables']]; assert all(n in v for n in ['project_name','project_slug','rust_msrv','primary_language']); assert len(d['ssot_invariants'])==4; assert len(d['files'])==9"

python3 -c "content=open('pheno-ssot-template/src/lib.rs.template').read(); assert content.count('{')==content.count('}'); assert content.count('(')==content.count(')'); assert 'pub fn run()' in content; assert 'pub async fn run_async()' in content; assert 'pheno_errors::' in content; assert 'pheno_tracing::' in content; assert 'pheno_config::' in content; assert 'tokio::' in content"
bash pheno-ssot-template/scripts/check-ssot-invariant-1-errors.sh /tmp/ssot-test  # positive: clean render, must pass
bash pheno-ssot-template/scripts/check-ssot-invariant-2-logging.sh /tmp/ssot-test  # positive: clean render, must pass

rm -rf /tmp/ssot-test-bad && bash pheno-ssot-template/scripts/render.sh pheno-bad-svc /tmp/ssot-test-bad && (echo 'pub fn bad() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> { Ok(()) }'; echo 'pub enum MyRepoError { X }'; echo 'println!("oops")'; echo 'tracing::info!("loaded {}", id)') >> /tmp/ssot-test-bad/src/lib.rs && bash pheno-ssot-template/scripts/check-ssot-invariant-1-errors.sh /tmp/ssot-test-bad  # negative: must FAIL
verification_result.notes: All 13 spec-required template files exist and are well-formed. template.yaml is valid YAML, name=pheno-ssot-template, all 4 required variables present (project_name, project_slug, rust_msrv with default '1.75', primary_language), 4 SSOT invariants, 9 files-to-render, 6 post_create_hooks. ci.yml is valid YAML with 3 jobs (test, clippy, fmt). Cargo.toml.template and deny.toml are valid TOML. lib.rs.template has balanced braces and parens, contains pub fn run() -> AppResult<()>, pub async fn run_async() -> AppResult<()>, imports pheno_errors/pheno_tracing/pheno_config, uses tokio via pheno-tokio-base. All 3 shell scripts pass bash -n. Positive dry-instantiation test: rendering to /tmp/ssot-test produces 11 files with all {{...}} substitutions applied, both SSOT invariant #1 and #2 checks report 'holds'. Negative test: after injecting forbidden patterns (Box<dyn std::error::Error>, enum MyRepoError, println!, tracing::info!('loaded {}', id)), both invariant checks correctly report 'violated'. The full `cargo check` cannot complete end-to-end (exit 4) because the path-deps to pheno-errors/pheno-tracing/pheno-config/pheno-tokio-base cannot resolve from /tmp — this is expected, the spec says 'best-effort' for cargo check, and the script's error message documents the path-dep requirement for downstream consumers.

agent_iteration: second-pass (first pass authored the 13-file skeleton in commit db276adc95; this iteration aligned with the V3 spec by renaming template.json → template.yaml and patched two latent bugs in the check scripts; final commit 211a0df2ec is the spec-conformance fixup)
